description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a sprawling, open floor plan and multiple interconnected rooms. The structure features large windows on several facades, allowing for ample natural light and a sense of spaciousness. The exterior walls are finished in a neutral gray, complemented by white window frames and interior walls. A garage is integrated into the design, with a visible car parked inside, and the main living areas are clearly delineated from the private bedrooms and bathrooms. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary architectural style, and the layout includes a visible front entrance and backyard access. The interior is furnished with essential elements such as beds, sofas, and kitchen appliances, reflecting a functional and comfortable urban residence.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and an integrated garage, featuring a spacious, open-plan interior.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front facade with large windows, the main entrance, and a glimpse into the living and bedroom areas.
description_view_1: The garage with a car is prominent, along with the open-plan living space and rear rooms visible through the cutaway.
description_view_2: This angle shows the kitchen, dining area, and additional bedrooms, emphasizing the open layout and interior furnishings.
description_view_3: The rear of the bungalow is visible, with grouped windows and access to the backyard, as well as the spacious central living area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
